generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX 2-D LiDAR sensor providing real-time point-cloud data for environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera capturing RGB-D data for environment reconstruction and object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On-board measurement of vehicle speed from Jetson-based controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On-board measurement of steering angle from Jetson-based controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point-cloud data streamed in real-time via ROS2 over Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data streamed in real-time via ROS2 over Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data streamed via ROS2 over Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data streamed via ROS2 over Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks generated by Data Collection Functional Entity"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCollectionFunctionalEntity
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for point-cloud segmentation and object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) algorithm compliant with ISO 15622 (Performance Class I)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point-cloud data after DBSCAN segmentation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed depth camera data for environment reconstruction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) after unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Final object tracks after Kalman filtering and validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Persistent SQL database storing time-series data for reporting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataProcessed, DepthCameraDataProcessed, VehicleStateData, ObjectTracksDataProcessed
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataCollectionFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing ISO 23247 Functional Entity for object track generation from raw sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectDetectionService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for serializing and unit-converting sensor streams (Wi-Fi → SQL database)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing DBSCAN clustering for point-cloud segmentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectDetectionService, VisualizationService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing Kalman filter for object tracking and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectDetectionService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing ISO 15622 compliant ACC algorithm with computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlService
]

instance DatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database interface for persistent storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService, DataStorageService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication between Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance ObjectDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Core service for detecting and tracking objects from processed sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackReportInsight
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm execution in Digital Twin returning desired speed commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operator UI for enabling/disabling ACC, adjusting speed, and issuing emergency brake"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisableAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D rendering of vehicle and environment using processed sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series reports of vehicle state and object tracks for post-analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReportInsight, ObjectTrackReportInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of collected data in SQL database for later reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataPersistenceInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of current speed and steering angle"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected objects and their tracks"
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D rendering of vehicle surroundings using processed LiDAR and camera data"
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series report of vehicle speed, steering angle, and system state"
]

instance ObjectTrackReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed report of detected objects, their trajectories, and interactions"
]

instance DataPersistenceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of data storage in SQL database for future analysis"
]

instance DesiredSpeedCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of motor voltage commands for longitudinal control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual enable/disable of ACC functionality by operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of target speed by operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking command issued by operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller driving the motor for longitudinal vehicle control"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo mechanism for lateral vehicle control via steering commands"
]

// C1: System Components
instance TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle chassis retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson components"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for wireless communication"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Primary compute platform running ROS2, sensor processing, and control algorithms"
]

// C1: System Environments
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin deployment on Traxxas Slash 4x4 chassis with sensors and actuators"
    base:contains TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano,
                 HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iCamera,
                 VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
                 VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin deployment on external compute with ROS2 packages and models"
    base:contains DataCollectionFunctionalEntity, DataTranslationEnabler,
                 PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ObjectTrackingEnabler,
                 ACCControlEnabler, DatabaseEnabler, ROS2Middleware
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operator workstation with visualization and remote management interfaces"
    base:contains DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService,
                 VisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin sends control commands back to the Physical Twin over the same Wi‑Fi/ROS 2 link: ACC enable/disable, desired speed set‑points, emergency‑brake commands, and actuation commands (motor voltage, steering angle) generated by the Controlling FE and Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with a maximum end‑to‑end latency of 100 ms from vehicle to DT (R7) and requires clocks synchronised within 100 ms accuracy (R8). Data collection and ACC computation occur at the perception‑cycle rate (typically tens of Hz)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT system (DTS) comprises the Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators, point‑cloud processing), the Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC, visualization, reporting, storage), the User Entity (3‑D UI and control panel), and a Cross‑System Data Translation Entity. Communication between entities uses ROS 2 intra‑node messages and Wi‑Fi inter‑entity links."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is used during design/development (cyber‑physical experimentation), testing (validation of ACC behavior), and operational phases (monitoring, remote management and health‑monitoring) as described in the case study."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by using high‑frequency sensor data, latency ≤100 ms, clock synchronisation ≤100 ms, and validated tracking algorithms (DBSCAN + Kalman). The ACC algorithm follows ISO 15622, and safety‑critical constraints are respected during off‑loading and remote command execution."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication uses a Wi‑Fi network; intra‑entity communication uses ROS 2 topics/services; data is serialised and unit‑converted by the Data Translation FE. No specific protocol such as OPC UA is employed in the implementation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on the on‑board NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity is hosted on external compute (cloud or workstation) reachable via Wi‑Fi; User Entity runs on an operator workstation providing the UI."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture is based on ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) reference architecture; the ACC control logic follows ISO 15622; ISO/IEC 30173:2023 concepts are acknowledged."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT respects the safety‑critical nature of ACC by enforcing a ≤100 ms latency, clock synchronisation, and providing remote emergency‑brake capability. No explicit security mechanisms (e.g., authentication, encryption) are described in the document."
]
